description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow surrounded by a well-maintained garden with various trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, with a driveway leading up to a garage on one side. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted concrete, and large windows are distributed along the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. The front entrance is set back, partially sheltered by an overhang, and the landscaping includes both green lawns and paved walkways. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a street, typical of suburban neighborhoods. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open space, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway, garage entrance, and a portion of the landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, garage, and symmetrical garden layout along the street.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the flat roof, overall building footprint, and arrangement of trees and pathways.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the backyard garden, rear facade, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
